ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: In qua B. Virginis Precibus de innumera Turcarum classe insignis divinitus est reportata victoria. Auctore R. P. F. Petro Villaroele Stylitano theologo min. strict. Observantiæ provintiæ neapolitanæ Academico Otioso. Cum indice rerum notabilium
ItacWorkItem.DedicationPlaceDate: Naples 3 November 1613 | Naples October 1613 | Naples 13 November 1611 |
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This text contains three dedications written in three different dates.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur. Petrus. Anton. Ghibertus Vicarius Gener. Meritò Typis hoc opus insigne promulgari debet usqye ad saeculi finem egregiè memorabile. Magister Cornel. Tirob. Præd. Ordinis Curiae Neap. Theologus.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
